name: Darwinbox
description: Darwinbox is a global end-to-end cloud-based HRMS platform popular in the Asia-Pacific region, providing comprehensive HR management including employee lifecycle, payroll, attendance, and talent management.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Contact your Darwinbox account manager or email integrationsteam@darwinbox.in to request API access
2. You will receive: a username, password, API key, and dataset key
3. Your subdomain is the part before .darwinbox.in in your Darwinbox URL (e.g. for https://acme.darwinbox.in, enter 'acme')
4. Enter all credentials below

Note: API access is provided on a request-only basis by the Darwinbox team.

credentialFields.label: Darwinbox Subdomain
credentialFields.helpText: Your Darwinbox subdomain. For example, if you access Darwinbox at https://acme.darwinbox.in, enter 'acme'.

credentialFields.label: API Username
credentialFields.helpText: The username provided by the Darwinbox team for API access.

credentialFields.label: API Password
credentialFields.helpText: The password provided by the Darwinbox team for API access.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: The API key provided by the Darwinbox team for endpoint authorization.

credentialFields.label: Dataset Key
credentialFields.helpText: The dataset key provided by the Darwinbox team. This determines which employee fields are returned.

checks.name: Darwinbox Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies that employee records can be accessed through the Darwinbox API, confirming the integration is properly configured and the API credentials have access to employee data.

checks.name: Darwinbox Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies that role-based access controls are configured in Darwinbox by checking that employees have designated job titles and organizational roles assigned.

checks.name: Darwinbox Organisation Chart
checks.description: Verifies that the organizational structure is properly configured in Darwinbox by checking that employees have reporting managers and department hierarchies assigned.
